headline: Eaton Teams with FranklinWH to Expand Technologies for Energy Affordability and Resilience in U.S. Homes
summary: PITTSBURGH, July 09, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton today announces a collaboration with FranklinWH to make intelligent, flexible home energy systems easier to buy, install and scale across North America. The integration of Eaton’s AbleEdge™ smart breakers with the FranklinWH System helps improve energy affordability by enabling more flexible, intelligent and simplified energy management at home. The companies will help make it easier for contractors and homeowners to integrate
